    My BEST Moon image till date.

    This image holds a special place in my heart. A waxing gibbous moon, on a night i actually do not remember.

    My first APOD submission

    One of my first REAL astrophotography accomplishments. It represented a level up from just a kid looking through the eyepiece to an amatuer astronomer.
